svg.text: Isoform architecture: TP53 panel 'tp53_isoforms_v1' on grch38_tp53
genomic span 6624..25760 | isoforms=7 | protein max=393 aa
panel source: Curated TP53 isoform panel inspired by DCD Figure-1 style transcript/protein architecture
Isoform architecture view: top panel shows transcript/exon structure on genomic coordinates with 5'->3' orientation left-to-right
(strand-aware axis), bottom panel shows per-isoform protein-domain architecture on amino-acid coordinates. Row order is shared across both
